children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary may make competitive grants for the acquisition of special purpose scientific research equipment for use in the food and agricultural sciences programs of eligible institutions.

children.heading: Maximum amount
children.label: b Maximum amount
children.text: The amount of a grant made to an eligible institution under this section may not exceed $500,000.

children.heading: Prohibition on charge or equipment as indirect costs
children.label: c Prohibition on charge or equipment as indirect costs

children.text: charged as an indirect cost against another Federal grant; or
included as part of the indirect cost pool for purposes of calculating the indirect cost rate of an eligible institution.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: e Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2023.
